# fix: resolve red team critical findings — security, trust signals, and UX

<!-- Generated by SessionEnd hook from a commit matching a journal-worthy pattern.
     Next session: review, then promote to a real journal entry OR delete. -->

**Commit**: `b149e941c152` — fix: resolve red team critical findings — security, trust signals, and UX

**Body**:

Security fixes:
- IDOR on booking endpoints: add tourist_id ownership check + status transition guard
- Server-side pricing: remove client-controlled gross_value, derive from guide budget tier
- Accept endpoint: verify license_verified + rating_count >= 5 before accepting plan

Trust signal fixes:
- Real star ratings from API (was hardcoded 5 stars for every guide)
- License verification badge on MatchCard and GuideDetailScreen
- Actual review counts displayed on discovery cards

UX improvements:
- Add experience_type screen to onboarding (authentic local vs tourist-friendly)
- Update matching algorithm to weight authenticity signals based on experience_type
- Dynamic pricing in booking confirmation (was hardcoded ฿1,500)
- Add language_pairs and location_coverage to match cards (was hardcoded)

Backend:
- Add license_verified, language_pairs, location_coverage to matches API response
- Add experience_type to Tourist model
- Add status transition validation on booking status updates

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 <noreply@anthropic.com>
